title: Cubed Textures - Dark UI
description: Overlay repository for the Cubed Textures resourcepack!
body:
# Cubed Textures - Dark UI This page acts as a download repository for Cubed Textures' overlays. Here you can find our releases and beta builds for dark mode and any future overlays we may create. These are loaded ABOVE the [main resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubed-textures) to change the aesthetics.
## What is Cubed Textures? Cubed Textures is a realistic Minecraft resource pack made for building enthusiasts and aspiring architects. Over 100 unique models, 300+ new textures, Custom Item Models and more, all without the use of mods. Our many unique features provide an in-depth building experience, with styles ranging from medieval and traditional to modern. This pack is currently in active development - don't miss out on the exciting new updates! ﻿[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/gQWEz6f.png)](https://cubed.community/discord) | [![GitHub](https://i.imgur.com/iztLhFG.png)](https://github.com/cubedcommunity/CubedTextures) | [![Models](https://i.imgur.com/PLUKfyL.png)](https://cubed.community/texturepack) :-------------------------:|:-------------------------:|:-------------------------:
## Need help? For assistance, [JOIN THE DISCORD](https://cubed.community/discord)! Remember to install Optifine and enable Connected Textures in settings. If you have bad shadows on models, set shadows to 50% in settings. _This pack is intended for creative-mode use only_. This is not suitable for survival-mode. We will release a version for survival-mode eventually!
